--- title: "Agents: The 6 Specialized Feature Generators" description: "Explore all 6 built-in agents, the AgentRegistry, and how to build a custom agent." date: today format: html: self-contained: true embed-resources: true code-fold: true code-tools: true --- ## Introduction Feature Forge ships with **6 specialized agents**, each designed for a distinct type of feature transformation. This notebook explores every agent, the `AgentRegistry` discovery mechanism, and how to create a custom agent via subclassing. ## Setup ::: {#setup .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} import os import warnings warnings.filterwarnings("ignore") import numpy as np import pandas as pd from sklearn.datasets import make_classification import feature_forge print(f"feature_forge: {feature_forge.__spec__.origin}") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` feature_forge: /Users/minghao/Desktop/personal/feature_forge/src/feature_forge/__init__.py ``` ::: ::: ## Discover Built-in Agents ::: {#agent-registry .cell execution_count=2} ``` {.python .cell-code} from feature_forge.agents import AgentRegistry agents = AgentRegistry.get_builtin_agents() print(f"Built-in agents ({len(agents)}):") for name, cls in agents.items(): print(f" - {name}: {cls.__name__}") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Built-in agents (6): - unary: UnaryFeatureAgent - cross_compositional: CrossCompositionalAgent - aggregation: AggregationConstructAgent - temporal: TemporalFeatureAgent - local_transform: LocalTransformAgent - local_pattern: LocalPatternAgent ``` ::: ::: ## Agent Capabilities ::: {#cell-agent-capabilities .cell execution_count=3} ``` {.python .cell-code} from feature_forge.agents.router import RouterAgent from feature_forge.config import Settings router = RouterAgent(Settings()) caps = router.AGENT_CAPABILITIES import pandas as pd cap_df = pd.DataFrame.from_dict(caps, orient="index") cap_df ``` ::: {#agent-capabilities .cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=3} ```{=html}
description required_column_types excluded_if min_columns requires_enrich
unary Generates features from single columns [numerical, categorical] [no_single_column_features] NaN NaN
cross_compositional Generates cross features between 2+ columns [numerical, categorical] [single_column_dataset] 2.0 NaN
aggregation Generates aggregation-based features [categorical, groupable] [no_categorical_for_grouping] NaN NaN
temporal Generates time-based features [datetime, temporal] [no_datetime_columns] NaN NaN
local_transform Generates local transformation features [numerical] [no_numerical_columns] NaN NaN
local_pattern Generates features based on distributional pat... [numerical, categorical] [] NaN True
``` ::: ::: ## Load Data ::: {#cell-load-data .cell cache='true' execution_count=4} ``` {.python .cell-code} X, y = make_classification( n_samples=200, n_features=6, n_informative=4, random_state=42 ) df = pd.DataFrame(X, columns=[f"f{i+1}" for i in range(X.shape[1])]) df["target"] = y df.head() ``` ::: {#load-data .cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=4} ```{=html}
f1 f2 f3 f4 f5 f6 target
0 -0.046871 2.138351 -1.285521 -1.072700 -0.903037 -1.492674 1
1 -1.024936 -0.038298 -2.124122 0.856841 -0.242814 -1.609433 0
2 -2.179571 -1.074040 -1.657299 -0.709876 -0.162627 -1.781360 0
3 1.025595 2.005875 -1.119966 1.060502 -0.868782 -0.191783 1
4 -0.180249 -1.306034 0.576556 0.460190 0.719035 0.403197 1
``` ::: ::: ## Instantiate and Run Each Agent ::: {#cell-run-agents .cell cache='true' execution_count=5} ``` {.python .cell-code} from feature_forge.config import LLMConfig, Settings from feature_forge.llm.base import LLMClient from feature_forge.llm.providers.deepseek import DeepSeekProvider settings = Settings( task="classification", llm=LLMConfig( model="deepseek-chat", api_key=os.environ.get("FF_LLM__API_KEY", ""), max_concurrent_calls=2, ), ) llm = DeepSeekProvider( model=settings.llm.model, api_key=settings.llm.api_key.get_secret_value() if settings.llm.api_key else None, ) context = { "description": {col: {"type": "numerical"} for col in df.columns if col != "target"}, "memory": "", "round_idx": 0, "positive_features": [], "negative_features": [], } agent_results = {} for name, cls in agents.items(): try: agent = cls(config=settings, llm_client=llm) specs = await agent.generate( X=df.drop(columns=["target"]), y=df["target"], context=context, ) agent_results[name] = { "specs": len(specs), "class": cls.__name__, "error": None, } except Exception as exc: agent_results[name] = {"specs": 0, "class": cls.__name__, "error": str(exc)[:100]} pd.DataFrame.from_dict(agent_results, orient="index") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` {"agent": "unary", "num_columns": 6, "round_idx": 0, "event": "agent_generate_start", "level": "span": null} {"agent": "local_pattern", "num_specs": 12, "latency_ms": 13877.9, "event": "agent_generate_complete", "level": "info", "timestamp": "2026-05-10T12:11:08.277879Z", "span": null} ``` ::: ``` ::: ::: ## Inspect Generated Specifications ::: {#inspect-specs .cell execution_count=6} ``` {.python .cell-code} # Pick one agent and show its raw specs agent_name = "unary" if agent_name in agents and not agent_results[agent_name].get("error"): agent = agents[agent_name](config=settings, llm_client=llm) specs = await agent.generate( X=df.drop(columns=["target"]), y=df["target"], context=context ) print(f"{agent_name} generated {len(specs)} specs:") for s in specs[:3]: print(f" - {s}") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` {"agent": "unary", "num_columns": 6, "round_idx": 0, "event": "agent_generate_start", "level": "info", "timestamp": "2026-05-10T12:11:08.302139Z", "span": null} {"provider": "deepseek", "model": "deepseek-chat", "num_messages": 2, "temperature": 0.2, "max_tokens": 4096, "event": "llm_request", "level": "info", "timestamp": "2026-05-10T12:11:08.302626Z", "span": null} {"provider": "deepseek", "model": "deepseek-chat", "prompt_tokens": 409, "completion_tokens": 690, "total_tokens": 1099, "latency_ms": 11536.7, "response_preview": "```json\n[\n {\n \"base_columns\": \"f1\",\n \"derived_features\": [\n {\n \"name\": \"f1_squared\",\n \"type\": \"numerical\",\n \"transform\": \"square\",\n \"logic\": \"Square of f1 to ca", "event": "llm_response", "level": "info", "timestamp": "2026-05-10T12:11:19.839816Z", "span": null} {"agent": "unary", "num_specs": 12, "latency_ms": 11537.9, "event": "agent_generate_complete", "level": "info", "timestamp": "2026-05-10T12:11:19.840510Z", "span": null} unary generated 12 specs: - {'name': 'f1_squared', 'type': 'numerical', 'transform': 'square', 'logic': 'Square of f1 to capture non-linear relationships', 'base_columns': ['f1'], 'agent_name': 'unary'} - {'name': 'f1_log', 'type': 'numerical', 'transform': 'logarithm', 'logic': 'Natural logarithm of f1 to handle skewed distributions or multiplicative effects', 'base_columns': ['f1'], 'agent_name': 'unary'} - {'name': 'f2_squared', 'type': 'numerical', 'transform': 'square', 'logic': 'Square of f2 to capture non-linear relationships', 'base_columns': ['f2'], 'agent_name': 'unary'} ``` ::: ::: ## Custom Agent ::: {#custom-agent .cell execution_count=7} ``` {.python .cell-code} from feature_forge.agents import BaseFeatureAgent class PolynomialAgent(BaseFeatureAgent): """Custom agent that suggests polynomial combinations.""" prompt_filename = "unary.txt" # Reuse unary prompt as template agent_name = "polynomial" # Custom agents are typically registered via pyproject.toml entry points: # [project.entry-points."feature_forge.agents"] # polynomial = "my_package:PolynomialAgent" print(f"Custom agent class: {PolynomialAgent.agent_name}") print(f"Built-in agents: {list(AgentRegistry.get_builtin_agents().keys())}") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Custom agent class: polynomial Built-in agents: ['unary', 'cross_compositional', 'aggregation', 'temporal', 'local_transform', 'local_pattern'] ``` ::: ::: ## Plot: Specs per Agent ::: {#cell-plot-specs .cell execution_count=8} ``` {.python .cell-code} import matplotlib.pyplot as plt plot_df = pd.DataFrame.from_dict(agent_results, orient="index") if "specs" in plot_df.columns: plot_df = plot_df[plot_df["error"].isna()] if not plot_df.empty: fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(8, 4)) plot_df["specs"].plot(kind="bar", ax=ax, color="teal") ax.set_title("Feature Specifications Generated per Agent") ax.set_ylabel("Count") ax.tick_params(axis="x", rotation=45) plt.tight_layout() plt.show() else: print("No successful agent runs to plot.") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display} ![](02_agents_files/figure-html/plot-specs-output-1.png){#plot-specs width=758 height=374} ::: ::: ## Summary - 6 built-in agents cover unary, cross-compositional, aggregation, temporal, local transform, and local pattern features - `AgentRegistry` discovers agents via entry points and manual registration - Each agent has declared capabilities used by the router for data-driven selection - Custom agents subclass `BaseFeatureAgent` and register via `AgentRegistry.register()`
